name: Dakota Gold Corp.
business: Dakota Gold Corp. is an exploration-stage company that focuses on acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral properties in the United States, specifically in the Homestake Mining District of South Dakota. The company has not realized any revenues from operations and is currently advancing its Richmond Hill Gold Project and other properties. Its 100%-owned mineral properties include 2,147 unpatented claims covering over 49,500 acres.

exposures.sentence: the February 2025 IA containing a measured and indicated mineral resource of 307.86 Mt at 0.470 g/t Au and 4.83 grams per tonne silver (g/t Ag) for 4.64 million ounces of gold and 47.77 million ounces of silver and an inferred mineral resource of 414.04 Mts at 0.381 g/t Au and 3.91 g/t Ag for 5.06 million ounces of gold and 52.11 million ounces of silver respectively.

catalysts.event: Transition to Pre-Feasibility Study for Richmond Hill Project
catalysts.sentence: The Company is transitioning from an Initial Assessment with Cash Flow to a Pre-Feasibility Study in the second half of 2026, followed by a Feasibility Study targeted for 2027.
metallurgical test work represents another critical planned activity in 2026... with final results expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Maiden mineral resource for Unionville Zone at Maitland property
catalysts.sentence: At the Maitland property, planned activities in 2026 will concentrate on advancing the Unionville Zone toward a maiden mineral resource by year-end.
